summary: Made two surgical seam edits: anchored Yusuf's opening workstation image to the Meridian offer in chapter 8 and added a dawn handoff that carries the unresolved handshake pressure into chapter 10's morning training scene.
edits: Referenced the afternoon Meridian meeting in the opening display description to connect chapter 9's entry to chapter 8's contract scene.
Added a brief line near the close noting that the building will wake into the same unresolved handshake risk, smoothing the handoff into chapter 10.
